rationale: The cited paper’s core contribution (an initial purchase increasing subsequent unrelated purchase via a momentum/mind-set mechanism) is conceptually close to the citing paper’s central sequential-choice question about self-perpetuating media consumption. In the citing note, the work is positioned against prior variety-seeking/consistency literatures, so this 2007 “Shopping Momentum Effect” is a plausible theory/comparison source rather than a clearly incidental mention; the DOI is directly matched in the references.
